title: VPS full runtime inventory

findings.subject: Docker daemon/context inventory
findings.finding: Collected 72 containers across 1 available Docker contexts.
findings.recommended_action: Review per-container classifications and migrate only with approval.

findings.subject: docker-viewport context
findings.recommended_action: If unavailable, document actual daemon split and repair context before migration work.

findings.subject: Containers with no linked repo
findings.finding: 56 containers have no repo label/link detected.
findings.recommended_action: Map each container to RuntimeContract/repo or classify archive/reference.

findings.subject: Containers with no linked domain
findings.finding: 50 containers have no domain label/link detected.
findings.recommended_action: Map domain/subdomain ownership or mark internal/no-domain intentionally.

findings.subject: /srv/viewport/migration mounted at /opt/data/migration
findings.recommended_action: If required, add explicit bind mount through approved runtime config; do not hot-edit now.

findings.subject: Disk usage df -h
findings.finding: df -h collected; top disk usage collected separately.
findings.recommended_action: Section 8/security cleanup decisions require approval before deletion.

recommended_action: Create/complete RuntimeContracts for every container and triage unhealthy/no-repo/no-domain services before migration.
